name: Wellesley College
meets_full_need_notes: Wellesley meets 100% of demonstrated financial need for all admitted domestic and international undergraduates. Need-blind admission for domestic applicants.
no_loan_notes: Wellesley has a no-loan policy for students from families with incomes below $65,000. For students above that threshold, modest loans may appear in packages, but Wellesley has reduced loan expectations significantly. Many packages remain loan-free.

merit_thresholds.notes: Wellesley offers a small number of merit awards, including the Wellesley College Scholarship and the Bernstein Scholarship. The vast majority of aid is need-based. Merit awards are folded into need-based packages when applicable.

ed_aid_implications: ED applicants receive the same need-based financial aid as RD applicants. Wellesley meets full need regardless of admission round.
appeal_policy: Students may appeal their financial aid by contacting Student Financial Services. Appeals require written documentation of special circumstances, changes in family finances, or unusual expenses not captured in initial application.
